description: Provenance manifest for all authoritative sources cited in defaxiom entries

sources.title: Constitution of Virginia, Article XII, Section 1
sources.description: Amendment procedure — proposal, passage, intervening election, second passage, 90-day rule, submission to voters

sources.title: Constitution of Virginia, Article IV, Section 12
sources.description: Form of laws — single object rule: 'No law shall embrace more than one object, which shall be expressed in its title.'

sources.title: Constitution of Virginia, Article II, Section 6
sources.description: Apportionment — existing provisions proposed to be amended by HB 1384

sources.title: Code of Virginia, § 30-13
sources.description: Publication/posting requirement for proposed constitutional amendments (repealed by HB 1384)

sources.title: Virginia Legislative Information System — HB 1384
sources.description: HB 1384 enrolled act text, session history, vote records, and bill tracking

sources.title: Virginia Supreme Court Order (2026)
sources.description: Supreme Court of Virginia order addressing the challenges to HB 1384 — identifies void ab initio finding, election sequencing, 90-day rule, publication, ballot language, and single object issues

sources.title: Virginia April 21, 2026 Ballot Specimen
sources.description: Ballot specimen showing the actual referendum question text presented to voters

sources.title: Ballotpedia — Virginia Use of Legislative Congressional Redistricting Map Amendment (2026)
sources.description: Encyclopedic summary of the amendment, including ballot language, arguments for and against, and procedural history

sources.title: Virginia Board of Elections — 2025 General Election
sources.description: Official election dates for the 2025 House of Delegates general election including early voting start date (September 19, 2025) and election day (November 4, 2025)

sources.title: Virginia Department of Elections — April 2026 Referendum
sources.description: Official referendum dates including early voting start (March 6, 2026) and referendum election day (April 21, 2026)
